excerpt: My cats are the silliest when they are sleepy. Mabel will rest her chin anywhere and pretend it’s a pillow (arms of chairs, my foot) and Lucky lets me squish his face all about while he purrs like a crazy kitty. Such lovers. <3
content: My cats are the silliest when they are sleepy. Mabel will rest her chin anywhere and pretend it’s a pillow (arms of chairs, my foot) and Lucky lets me squish his face all about while he purrs like a crazy kitty. Such lovers. <3
